assertions.reason: On the resume step, Continue stayed disabled until usable resume text was provided via paste mode; once non-empty resume text was present, Continue enabled immediately.
Finishing onboarding saved the profile locally and reopening Portfolio after reload still showed the saved resume/preferences (tone Warm, max words 350, writing sample/profile materials present).
Uploading jobbored-resume-replacement replaced the previous primary resume while the separate writing sample remained listed in Portfolio.
The optional writing sample and AI context entered during onboarding persisted locally and reappeared in Portfolio after reload.

Saving LinkedIn text updated visible profile metadata, clearing AI context removed only AI context while leaving LinkedIn/resume/sample intact, and clearing LinkedIn removed only LinkedIn while preserving resume/sample data.

frictions: Onboarding required stepping through every profile stage, but all required interactions worked in one browser session.
Primary resume was replaced later in the same session, so persistence evidence uses both the immediate post-onboarding screenshots and the later profile state.
summary: Round 4 completed the local onboarding/profile assertions that were previously blocked. Resume gating, onboarding persistence, replaceable primary resume behavior, optional writing-sample/AI-context persistence, and LinkedIn/AI clear isolation all passed with browser evidence.
